title: englerastrum tetragonum
intro: Englerastrum tetragonum, also known as the four-angled Englerastrum, is a plant species that belongs to the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds. It is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation, offering several health benefits including soothing irritated skin, reducing redness, and preventing infection. Englerastrum tetragonum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
